nasb.text: Now then, please take your gear, your quiver and your bow, and go out to the field and hunt game for me;

esv.text: Now then, take your weapons, your quiver and your bow, and go out to the field and hunt game for me,

cnv.text: 你現在拿你打獵的用具，就是你的箭囊和弓，出到田野去為我打獵。

ccb.text: 现在，带着你的弓箭去田野为我打些野味来，

csbs.text: 现在拿上你的猎具，箭囊和弓，到田野去为我打些野味。
